# agentops_mcp_gateway_group (Resource)

An MCP gateway group that bundles member servers under a shared allow/deny policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "agentops_mcp_gateway_group" "core" {
  name              = "core-tools"
  member_server_ids = [agentops_mcp_gateway_server.docs.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique group name; used in the `/mcp/g/{group}` route and as the policy key.

### Optional

- `allow` (List of String) Group-level allow globs, applied on top of each member server's rules (empty = inherit server). Can only narrow: a tool the owning server denies stays denied even if a group allow matches it.
- `deny` (List of String) Group-level deny globs, layered on top of server rules; deny wins.
- `member_server_ids` (List of String) IDs of the MCP servers that belong to this group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Group identifier.
